Meet the speakers! – EUDTP 2025 - EuroTech Universities Alliance
snippet: Fabio Giglietto is listed as a speaker at the EU Digital Technologies and Policy Conference 2025, discussing implementation challenges and opportunities under DSA (Digital Services Act). He is described as a Professor of Internet Studies at University of Urbino Carlo Bo, researching disinformation dynamics and computational methods for detecting manipulation campaigns.
description: Fabio Giglietto is listed as a speaker at the EU Digital Technologies and Policy Conference 2025, focusing on the Digital Services Act and his research on disinformation dynamics and computational methods for detecting manipulation campaigns.

snippet: Fabio Giglietto is among the scientists who have signed a call to protect research on disinformation. He is listed with his affiliation as University of Urbino, Italy.
description: This article on Tech Policy Press discusses a call to protect disinformation research, and Fabio Giglietto of the University of Urbino is listed as one of the signatories.

title: Health Discourse Research Initiative
snippet: Fabio Giglietto, along with Samuel Olaniran and Roberto Mincigrucci, is involved in mapping and studying misinformation networks via coordinated social media in Nigeria. His team at Università di Urbino Carlo Bo worked to identify coordinated link-sharing networks on Facebook, focusing on health information in Nigeria and India.
description: The Health Discourse Research Initiative mentions Fabio Giglietto's involvement in mapping and studying misinformation networks via coordinated social media in Nigeria, focusing on health information on Facebook.

title: Who is behind vera.ai? Meet the people and teams that make up the vera.ai project. #8 Team of University of Urbino Carlo Bo
snippet: Fabio Giglietto leads the University of Urbino Carlo Bo team within the vera.ai project. The team coordinates Work Package 4 (WP4), focusing on discovering potentially problematic content in near-real-time using a content-agnostic approach, specifically addressing coordinated sharing behavior using social media analysis and network science methods.
description: This article introduces Fabio Giglietto as the leader of the University of Urbino Carlo Bo team within the vera.ai project, focusing on discovering problematic content through social media analysis and network science.
